title: indices.simulate_index_template

name.description: Name of the index to simulate

create.description: Whether the index template we optionally defined in the body should only be dry-run added if new or can also replace an existing one

cause.description: User defined reason for dry-run creating the new template for simulation purposes

master_timeout.description: Period to wait for a connection to the master node. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.

include_defaults.description: If true, returns all relevant default configurations for the index template.

description:
Simulate an index.

Get the index configuration that would be applied to the specified index from an existing index template.
